forecast-period.text: Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the north early this morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloud clearing. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Sunny. Patches of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog early this morning. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Cloud clearing. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 23 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then tending northwest to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h before dawn then tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 31 to 36.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloud clearing. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 21 to 26.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloud clearing. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog early this morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast at night. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west during this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 36.

The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 32.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 32.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
